nasb.text: Sanctify My sabbaths; and they shall be a sign between Me and you, that you may know that I am the Lord your God.’

esv.text: and keep my Sabbaths holy that they may be a sign between me and you, that you may know that I am the Lord your God.’

cnv.text: 你們要把我的安息日分別為聖，作我與你們之間的憑據，使你們知道我是耶和華你們的　神。

ccb.text: 尊我定的安息日为圣日，作为我与你们之间的记号，使你们知道我是你们的上帝耶和华。
